---
title: "R Notebook"
output: none

Author: Galen O'Shea-Stone
Date: 10/6/25
Title: HOX_dev_focus
---

```{r}
# ======================================================================
# HOX axis analyzer (DE-only)
# - Input: DE table with gene symbols (GRCg7b), columns: gene, padj,
#          and either log2FC or log2FoldChange; ideally baseMean.
# - Outputs:
#   1) HOX_expression_grid_SIGONLY.{png,pdf}  (fill = log2(baseMean+1))
#   2) HOX_log2FC_grid_SIGONLY.{png,pdf}      (fill = log2FC)
#   3) HOX_direction_SIGONLY.{png,pdf}        (up/down)
#   4) gene_calls_with_HOX_annotations.csv
#   5) somitogenesis_focus_GRCg7b.csv
# ======================================================================

# ---------------------------
# CONFIG
# ---------------------------
de_file <- "DESeq2_Sacral_vs_Tail_by_SYMBOL.csv"   # <-- set this to your DE results file
out_dir <- "hox_axis_outputs"
padj_cut <- 0.05

# ---------------------------
# Libraries
# ---------------------------
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr); library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(stringr)
  library(ggplot2); library(scales)
})

dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# ---------------------------
# Helpers
# ---------------------------
guess_reader <- function(path){
  first <- readr::read_lines(path, n_max = 1)
  if (grepl(",", first)) return(readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  if (grepl("\t", first)) return(readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  readr::read_table(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
}
hox_parse <- function(sym){
  m <- stringr::str_match(sym, "^HOX([ABCD])(\\d{1,2})$")
  if (is.na(m[1,1])) return(c(NA, NA))
  c(m[1,2], as.integer(m[1,3]))
}
rename_if <- function(df, from, to){
  i <- which(tolower(names(df))==tolower(from)); if(length(i)==1) names(df)[i] <- to; df
}

# ---------------------------
# Load DE table
# ---------------------------
de <- guess_reader(de_file)
names(de) <- gsub("\\s+","_",names(de))
if (!"gene" %in% tolower(names(de))) names(de)[1] <- "gene"
names(de)[tolower(names(de))=="gene"] <- "gene"
de <- de |>
  rename_if("log2foldchange","log2FoldChange") |>
  rename_if("log2fc_shrunken","log2FC_shrunken") |>
  rename_if("basemean","baseMean")

# Guard rails
stopifnot("padj" %in% names(de))
if (!("log2FC" %in% names(de)) && !("log2FoldChange" %in% names(de)))
  stop("DE file must contain 'log2FC' or 'log2FoldChange'.")
if (!("baseMean" %in% names(de)))
  stop("DE file is missing 'baseMean' — needed for the expression heatmap. (If unavailable, I can color by another metric, e.g., -log10(padj) or abs(log2FC).)")

val_col    <- if ("log2FoldChange" %in% names(de)) "log2FoldChange" else "log2FC"
shrink_col <- if ("log2FC_shrunken" %in% names(de)) "log2FC_shrunken" else val_col

de2 <- de |>
  mutate(
    gene = toupper(as.character(gene)),
    HOX_cluster = sapply(gene, function(g) hox_parse(g)[1]),
    HOX_PG      = as.integer(sapply(gene, function(g) hox_parse(g)[2])),
    is_HOX      = !is.na(HOX_cluster),
    log2FC_raw  = .data[[val_col]],
    log2FC_shr  = .data[[shrink_col]],
    expr_log2   = log2(pmax(as.numeric(baseMean), 0) + 1),   # expression metric from DE only
    dir = case_when(.data[[val_col]] > 0 ~ "up",
                    .data[[val_col]] < 0 ~ "down",
                    TRUE ~ "flat"),
    sig = padj < padj_cut
  ) |>
  mutate(HOX_cluster = factor(HOX_cluster, levels = c("A","B","C","D")))

# ---------------------------
# Tables (same as before)
# ---------------------------
present_tbl <- de2 |>
  mutate(call = case_when(sig & dir=="up"   ~ "↑ (padj<0.05)",
                          sig & dir=="down" ~ "↓ (padj<0.05)",
                          TRUE              ~ "ns")) |>
  select(gene, HOX_cluster, HOX_PG, log2FC_raw, log2FC_shr, baseMean, expr_log2, padj, call)
write_csv(present_tbl, file.path(out_dir,"gene_calls_with_HOX_annotations.csv"))

somite_set <- c("MEOX1","MEOX2","TCF15","MYF5","MYOD1","DLL3","TBX6","SNAI1","SNAI2",
                "DACT2","DVL1","FZD1","FGF8","FGF18","WNT3A","WNT5A","WNT11",
                "CYP26A1","ALDH1A2","GDF11","HOXA11","HOXD11","HOXC11","HOXA13","HOXD13",
                "ZIC1","NPAS4","TBX1","SOX6","SLIT3")
somite_tbl <- de2 |> filter(gene %in% somite_set) |> arrange(padj, desc(abs(log2FC_raw)))
write_csv(somite_tbl, file.path(out_dir,"somitogenesis_focus_GRCg7b.csv"))

# ---------------------------
# Common plot settings (white background, A at top)
# ---------------------------
rev_y <- c("D","C","B","A")  # reverse so A prints at the top
theme_white <- theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank())

# ---------------------------
# PLOT 1 — HOX expression grid (sig-only), fill = log2(baseMean + 1)
# ---------------------------
hox_expr_sig <- de2 |> filter(is_HOX, sig)

lims_expr <- quantile(hox_expr_sig$expr_log2, c(0.05, 0.95), na.rm = TRUE)
if (!all(is.finite(lims_expr)) || diff(lims_expr)==0)
  lims_expr <- range(hox_expr_sig$expr_log2, na.rm = TRUE)

p_expr <- ggplot(hox_expr_sig, aes(HOX_PG, HOX_cluster, fill = expr_log2)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:13) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev_y, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", limits = lims_expr, oob = squish, na.value = "white") +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = "HOX (A–D × PG1–13) — mean expression proxy: log2(baseMean + 1), significant only",
       x = "Paralog group (PG)", y = "Cluster (A at top)", fill = "log2(baseMean+1)") +
  theme_white
ggsave(file.path(out_dir,"HOX_expression_grid_SIGONLY.png"), p_expr, width = 10, height = 3, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir,"HOX_expression_grid_SIGONLY.pdf"), p_expr, width = 10, height = 3, device = cairo_pdf)

# ---------------------------
# PLOT 2 — HOX log2FC grid (sig-only; diverging)
# ---------------------------
hox_lfc_sig <- de2 |> filter(is_HOX, sig)
lfs <- hox_lfc_sig$log2FC_raw; if (length(na.omit(lfs)) < 3) lfs <- c(-1, 1)
L  <- max(1, as.numeric(quantile(abs(lfs), 0.9, na.rm = TRUE)))
lims_lfc <- c(-L, L)

p_lfc <- ggplot(hox_lfc_sig, aes(HOX_PG, HOX_cluster, fill = log2FC_raw)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:13) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev_y, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#CFE8FF", mid = "#FFFFFF", high = "#FFD6CC",
                       limits = lims_lfc, midpoint = 0, oob = squish) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = "HOX (A–D × PG1–13) — log2FC (raw), significant only",
       x = "Paralog group (PG)", y = "Cluster (A at top)", fill = "log2FC") +
  theme_white
ggsave(file.path(out_dir,"HOX_log2FC_grid_SIGONLY.png"), p_lfc, width = 10, height = 3, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir,"HOX_log2FC_grid_SIGONLY.pdf"), p_lfc, width = 10, height = 3, device = cairo_pdf)

# ---------------------------
# PLOT 3 — HOX direction map (sig-only)
# ---------------------------
p_dir <- ggplot(hox_lfc_sig, aes(HOX_PG, HOX_cluster, fill = ifelse(log2FC_raw < 0, "down","up"))) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:13) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev_y, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(down = "#FFD6CC", up = "#CFE8FF")) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = "HOX direction — significant only",
       x = "Paralog group (PG)", y = "Cluster (A at top)", fill = "Call") +
  theme_white
ggsave(file.path(out_dir,"HOX_direction_SIGONLY.png"), p_dir, width = 10, height = 3, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir,"HOX_direction_SIGONLY.pdf"), p_dir, width = 10, height = 3, device = cairo_pdf)

# ---------------------------
# Console summary
# ---------------------------
message("Saved to: ", normalizePath(out_dir))
cat("Files:\n",
    " - HOX_expression_grid_SIGONLY.png / .pdf (fill = log2(baseMean+1))\n",
    " - HOX_log2FC_grid_SIGONLY.png / .pdf\n",
    " - HOX_direction_SIGONLY.png / .pdf\n",
    " - gene_calls_with_HOX_annotations.csv\n",
    " - somitogenesis_focus_GRCg7b.csv\n", sep = "")


```
